items.title: Airport and reserve reliability discovery
items.name: Airport and reserve reliability discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing which airport and reserve failure modes most materially hurt rider trust and premium trip conversion.
items.opportunity: Decide whether the next scale move should emphasize constrained-zone execution, supply reservation quality, or rider communication clarity first.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve airport and reserve trip predictability.

assignments.how: Leads problem framing and evidence synthesis.

riskFocus.question: Will improved airport and reserve predictability change rider behavior meaningfully?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Riders will choose these products more often when they believe timing risk is lower.

riskFocus.question: Can constrained pickup improvements be delivered consistently across different airports and venues?
riskFocus.hypothesis: A reusable orchestration layer can absorb most city and airport variation.

plannedActivities: Map reserve fulfillment failures by market
items.decisionToMake: Choose the smallest set of airport and reserve improvements that materially shifts confidence and completion.

items.title: Driver trust and earnings discovery
items.name: Driver trust and earnings discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing which earnings and compliance frictions most strongly damage short-horizon driver retention.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether the next best investment is payout explanation, dispatch quality, or support-response speed.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve driver productivity and retention by making payouts, compliance, and support outcomes easier to trust.

assignments.how: Leads driver problem framing and prioritization.

riskFocus.question: Which trust friction matters most to active drivers?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Drivers react more strongly to opaque losses and status changes than to isolated UI inconvenience.

riskFocus.question: Can drivers understand new earnings explanations quickly enough to change behavior?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Simpler earnings and compliance states reduce support demand and improve trust.

items.decisionToMake: Choose the highest-leverage trust fix for supply retention in focus markets.
